Source: AgentCore Doc History
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/doc-history.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore - Document History

## December 2, 2025 (Major Update)
- Policy-based governance and control for agent interactions
- Episodic Memory Strategy for AgentCore Memory
- Custom Claims Value Support for Gateway authentication
- Bidirectional Streaming via WebSocket for interactive experiences
- Authentication Token Support (OAuth) for AgentCore Gateway
- AgentCore Evaluations for agent/tool performance measurement
- API Gateway Targets support for REST API stages

## November 2025
- Nov 4: Direct Code Deployment via Python ZIP archives

## October 2025
- Oct 30: Web Bot Auth (Preview) — cryptographic HTTP request signing
- Oct 13: Runtime Identity Service-Linked Role for workload identity
- Oct 13: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore — General Availability
- Oct 10: MCP Servers as Gateway Targets
- Oct 2: MCP Server Support (compatible with Kiro, Cursor, Claude Code, Amazon Q CLI)

## September 2025
- Sep 19: Managed Policy Updates (BedrockAgentCoreNetworkServiceRolePolicy)

## July 2025
- Jul 16: Initial Release (Preview)
